source: ESPN FIFA World Cup + per-player news feeds

items.headline: SAFA confirms death of Bafana midfielder Jayden Adams' grandmother
items.description: SAFA confirmed Mamelodi Sundowns and Bafana midfielder Jayden Adams played through grief at the FIFA World Cup a day after his grandmother's death.

items.headline: Not laughing now: How World Cup fans vindicated McKennie's love of ranch
items.description: Ranch Dressing is everywhere. In myriad memes, in reels, in fans' carry-on suitcases and, apparently, in the mouths of countless international visitors to the United States who seem to be discovering its incredible finishing ability for the first time.

items.headline: World Cup 2026 - updates as Cape Verde set up Argentina clash, Ghana face Croatia
items.description: Cape Verde made history on Friday by setting up a round of 32 date with Argentina. Saturday will see Ghana, Congo DR and Algeria in action.

items.headline: Scotland's chance of qualifying for World Cup knockout stage falls to 0.07%
items.description: Scotland's chances of qualifying for the World Cup knockout stage have plummeted to just 0.07% following results on Friday, according to Opta.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Man City to battle Arsenal, Liverpool, Real Madrid for Bouaddi
items.description: Manchester City are the latest team to join the race for Lille and Morocco midfielder Ayyoub Bouaddi. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.headline: Bafana's World Cup clash with Canada can change South Africa's football trajectory
items.description: When Hugo Broos' Bafana Bafana face Canada in the FIFA World Cup round of 32 at Los Angeles Stadium, a win could make a major difference to South Africa's football ecosystem.

items.headline: Iran coach after late VAR call: 'Used to think we were an oppressed team, but we are also an unlucky team'
items.description: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei lamented both the conditions his team have had to face in this tournament, but also the bad luck they encountered.

items.headline: World Cup Daily LIVE: Cristiano Ronaldo's new golden boots, Argentina rest Messi as final groups decided
items.description: It's the final day of World Cup action from the group stages, as Portugal's Cristiano Ronaldo and Argentina's Lionel Messi (maybe) could play on the same day.

items.headline: Iran face wait over World Cup future, as fate intervenes again vs. Egypt
items.description: Add their own fate at the World Cup to the long list of things Iran can't control. But Team Melli came close vs. Egypt with two moments of late, unscripted drama.

items.headline: World Cup VAR review: Why was Iran's late goal ruled out for offside?
items.description: For the tournament, we are taking a look at the major incidents to examine and explain the process in terms of both VAR protocol and the laws of the game.

items.description: In a sixth World Cup for Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo, could the pair finally face each other in the tournament?

items.description: ESPN's By The Numbers brings you best stats from the World Cup action on June 26.

items.headline: Spain win group but Yéremy Pino could miss rest of World Cup
items.description: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente has confirmed that the team's qualification for the World Cup knockout stage -- topping Group H after a 1-0 win over Uruguay -- came at a cost, with injury concerns over wingers Nico Williams and Yéremy Pino.

items.headline: Socceroos Leckie, Italiano ruled out for the rest of the World Cup
items.description: The Socceroos will play the remainder of their FIFA World Cup campaign with 24 players, after attacker Mathew Leckie and defender Jacob Italiano were ruled out of the tournament through injury.

items.headline: 2026 FIFA World Cup match schedule: Fixtures, results, features

items.headline: 'I could write you a book about Sadio Mane' - Pape Thiaw lauds Senegal legend as Last 32 berth secured
items.description: Senegal head coach Pape Thiaw has heaped praise on Sadio Mane after the Teranga Lions breathed life into their World Cup campaign with a 5-0 demolition of Iraq on Friday, ultimately securing their progress to the knockouts in the process.

items.headline: Belgium clinch knockout spot as New Zealand exit World Cup
items.description: Leandro Trossard scored a pair of goals and Belgium overcame a slow start at the World Cup to advance to the knockout round with a 5-1 victory over New Zealand on Friday night.

items.headline: Socceroos set to play Egypt in 2026 World Cup round of 32
items.description: The Socceroos will face Egypt in the round of 32 of the FIFA World Cup, after Belgium's 5-1 win over New Zealand and the Pharaohs' dramatic 1-1 draw with Iran saw them fall to second-place in Group G on goal difference.

items.headline: Socceroos confident of being a 'problem' in World Cup knockouts
items.description: Socceroos midfielder Jackson Irvine is bullish on Australia's chances in the knockouts, while coach Tony Popovic says an eight-day break before their round of 32 clash in Dallas is ideal for recovery.

items.headline: Carlos Queiroz wants Black Stars to channel Manchester United's 'Nou Camp spirit' to bring joy to Ghana
items.description: In the aftermath of Ghana's 0-0 draw with England in their second World Cup game in Foxborough on Tuesday, former Manchester United midfielder Paul Scholes was quick to identify where he'd seen the Black Stars' gameplan before.

items.headline: Lineker, Shearer, Owen, Rooney, Kane - is England's near half-century of world-class strikers about to end?
items.description: With an elite striker having worn the Three Lions on their chest for 42 years, England have taken the position for granted - but is Harry Kane the last?

items.headline: Which players have scored a hat trick in the World Cup?

items.headline: What might have been: World Cup exit leaves All Whites with regrets
items.description: If there was one major emotion emanating from All Whites players as they trudged to their team bus on Friday evening, it was a sense of regret. And it wasn't over their heavy defeat at the hands of the Belgians.

items.headline: England clinch World Cup knockout spot before Panama game
items.description: England have clinched a spot in the knockout rounds of the 2026 World Cup ahead of their final match of the group stage against Panama on Saturday.

items.headline: Belgium coach hits back at 'ugly' World Cup criticism of 'immense' Group G winners
items.description: Belgium head coach Rudi Garcia has hit back at the "ugly" criticism of his team after Friday's 5-1 victory over New Zealand.

items.headline: Iran and Egypt draw after winner overturned
items.description: Shojae Khalilzadeh appeared to score the winning goal and secure Iran a spot in the knockouts only for VAR to disallow the goal for offside.

items.headline: Brazil have improved during the World Cup, but is it enough?

items.description: Pressure is mounting on Thomas Tuchel's England. ESPN's Tom Hamilton looks at why Panama is about far more than three points before the knockouts.

items.headline: Three games in, Belgium have finally kick-started their World Cup
items.description: Leandro Trossard's brace sealed Belgium top spot in Group G, and helped blow out the cobwebs from what has been a very slow tournament start from the former world No. 1s.
